title: Sponsorship agreement holders: Sponsor a refugee with special needs - Canada.ca
content:
## Sponsor a refugee with special needs
The Joint Assistance Sponsorship (JAS) Program helps refugees with special needs to come to Canada. These refugees could experience longer or more difficult periods of integration. Special needs include:
- trauma from violence or torture
- medical disabilities
- the effects of systemic discrimination
- a large number of family members
We support JAS refugees financially for up to 2 or 3 years. As a sponsor, you’ll help them adjust to life in Canada.
- Find an eligible refugee You need to find an eligible JAS refugee to sponsor. Once you match, the Refugee Sponsorship Training Program (RSTP) will send your information to the Resettlement Operations Centre in Ottawa (ROC-O). They will email you with application instructions.

## Find an eligible refugee
You need to find an eligible JAS refugee to sponsor.
Once you match, the Refugee Sponsorship Training Program (RSTP) will send your information to the Resettlement Operations Centre in Ottawa (ROC-O). They will email you with application instructions.
- Prepare your documents You must use the document checklist (IMM 5495) (opens in a new tab) to make sure you include all the forms and documents you need . Read the instruction guide to fill out all the forms correctly. PDF forms you must fill out and print Undertaking/Application for a Joint Assistance Sponsorship (IMM 1324) (opens in a new tab) Settlement Plan – Joint Assistance Sponsorship (IMM 5494) (opens in a new tab) Sponsor Assessment (IMM 5492) (opens in a new tab) Document Checklist – Joint Assistance Sponsorship (IMM 5495) (opens in a new tab) PDF forms you’ll fill out and print if they apply to you Request for a Joint Assistance Sponsorship Refugee Profile (IMM 5504) (opens in a new tab) Use of a Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in a new tab)

## Prepare your documents
You must use the document checklist (IMM 5495) (opens in a new tab) to make sure you include all the forms and documents you need . Read the instruction guide to fill out all the forms correctly.

### PDF forms you must fill out and print
- Undertaking/Application for a Joint Assistance Sponsorship (IMM 1324) (opens in a new tab)
- Settlement Plan – Joint Assistance Sponsorship (IMM 5494) (opens in a new tab)
- Sponsor Assessment (IMM 5492) (opens in a new tab)
- Document Checklist – Joint Assistance Sponsorship (IMM 5495) (opens in a new tab)

### PDF forms you’ll fill out and print if they apply to you
- Request for a Joint Assistance Sponsorship Refugee Profile (IMM 5504) (opens in a new tab)
- Use of a Representative (IMM 5476) (opens in a new tab)
- Submit your application Make sure: you sign and date your forms you’ve included everything on the document checklist We’ll return your application if it’s incomplete.

## Submit your application
- you sign and date your forms
- you’ve included everything on the document checklist
We’ll return your application if it’s incomplete.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
